TENTH OF BRIDGE COST

pages.raw_text:
The Washington Water Power
CO., by paying 5000 a year for
the privilege of using the Monroe
street bridge, will have paid but a
bridge by the time the bonds ma
ture.


Figuring the cost of the bridge
at $360.000. the total cost of the
structure at the end of % years,
counting principal and interest at
four per cent, will be $1,0S0,00
and of this amount the company
will pay $125.O00, or a little less
than one, tenth.


In spite of this, Comptroller
Farley feels that the city has
made a good bargain and says that
the company will pay practically
one third of the Interest every
year up to the time the bonds ma.
ture. 1t is further pointed out that
the company will continue to pay
the $4,000 a year after the bonds
mature-proyided it is held the
company has a perpetual franchise
across the bridge. That sounds
like a joke.


"The main thing to consider
about the bridge is it's per-
manency." said Mr.. Farley today.
